Home.title: Seamless Global Mobility & Logistics
Home.description: Your trusted partner for International Visas, Air Ticketing, and Secure Cargo Solutions. We simplify the journey so you can travel with confidence.
Home.features_desc: We handle the complexities of international travel, visa processing, and cargo logistics so you can focus on your journey.
Home.ticket_desc: Global flight bookings with 24/7 premium assistance. We secure the best routes at the most competitive rates.
Home.visa_desc: Expert guidance for Work, Family, and Visit visas. We simplify complex documentation for high success rates.
Home.cargo_desc: Secure, transparent door-to-door delivery. Real-time tracking for your global shipments and valuables.
Home.hajj_desc: Complete spiritual journey management. Premium accommodation, transport, and expert guidance for pilgrims.
Home.why_us_desc: Beyond just travel, we provide a technologically advanced ecosystem for global mobility. Our platform ensures every transaction is transparent, secure, and efficient.
Home.digital_integrity_desc: Encrypted systems protecting your personal data and financial records.
Home.operational_excellence_desc: Precision-driven workflows that eliminate bureaucracy and delays.
Home.trust_desc: Our commitment to security and reliability has made us a leading choice for global mobility needs.

About.title: About Us
About.content: Balaka Travel is a specialized management system for the travel and logistics industry. We provide a streamlined platform for managing international visas, air ticketing, and cargo services. Our goal is to make travel management simple, transparent, and reliable for everyone.

Privacy.title: Terms & Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Our operational guidelines and data protection standards
Privacy.introduction: At Balaka Travel, we prioritize transparency in both data handling and financial operations. This document outlines our commitment to your privacy and the terms governing our global mobility services.
Privacy.data_collection_desc: We collect essential information (Passport, NID, Contact details) solely to facilitate your travel and logistics requests. Accuracy is maintained through rigorous verification protocols.
Privacy.data_usage_desc: Your data is used to establish legal entries for visas, flight bookings, and cargo logistics. Personal identification documents are purged from our active systems 7 days after service completion.
Privacy.data_protection_desc: We employ industry-standard encryption (AES-128) for PII at rest. Our systems are audited regularly to ensure compliance with global data protection standards.
Privacy.currency_policy_desc: Exchange rates (e.g., SAR to BDT) are fetched in real-time from global financial feeds. Once a service request is established or priced, the rate is locked for that specific operation to protect against market volatility and inflation. Fractional mismatches may occur compared to public trackers due to provider refresh cycles.
Privacy.cookies_desc: We use essential session cookies to maintain your secure authentication and provide a seamless dashboard experience.

Footer.tagline: Your trusted global mobility partner. Simplifying international visas, ticketing, and secure cargo logistics with professional rigor and transparency.
